channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: PHOTOS: Your car has a lot to say about who you are
item.description: Photographer Martin Roemer visited 22 countries — from the U.S. to Senegal to India — to show how our identities are connected to our mode of transpor...

item.title: Looking for life purpose? Start with building social ties
item.description: Research shows that having a sense of purpose can lower stress levels and boost our mental health. Finding meaning may not have to be an ambitious pro...

item.title: Golden again! U.S. tops Canada to win 1st men's hockey gold since 'Miracle on Ice'
item.description: In the first Olympics with stars of the NHL competing in over a decade, a talent-packed Team USA faces a tough test against Canada.

item.title: Pakistan claims to have killed at least 70 militants in strikes along Afghan border
item.description: Pakistan's military killed at least 70 militants in strikes along the border with Afghanistan early Sunday, the deputy interior minister said.

item.title: Danish military evacuates U.S. submariner who needed urgent medical care off Greenland
item.description: Denmark's military says its arctic command forces evacuated a crew member of a U.S. submarine off the coast of Greenland for urgent medical treatment.

item.title: Open: This is "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Feb. 22, 2026
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the Supreme Court struck a blow to President Trump's tariffs, Margaret Brennan speaks to U.S....

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 22)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: 'Affront to humanity': Sudan slams Uganda for hosting RSF paramilitary boss
item.description: Sudan accuses Uganda of flouting international law by meeting Rapid Support Forces boss Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo.

item.title: U.S. beats Canada in thrilling and nail-biting Olympics gold medal final
item.description: Through a sudden death overtime goal, the U.S. men's hockey team is golden over Canada.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: U.S. Secret Service announced Sunday that an armed man was shot and killed after entering the secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, President Donald Trump’s...

item.title: 1/18: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem joins to discuss recent federal action in Minneapolis. T...

item.title: Blizzard warnings send East Coast scrambling to prepare for heavy snow and strong winds
Maps show winter storm forecast bring snow, blizzard conditions to East Coast
item.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey and coastal communities along the East Coast.

item.title: Explosions kill police officer and injure 25 in western Ukraine
item.description: Twenty-five people were injured by explosions overnight in what officials are calling a terror attack.

item.title: Minnesota Vikings receiver Moore dies aged 25
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings have paid tribute to Rondale Moore after the 25-year-old's death.

item.title: Pakistan launches deadly strikes on Afghanistan
item.description: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

item.title: Trump curious why Iran has not 'capitulated', US envoy Witkoff says
item.description: US envoy Steve Witkoff says the president is puzzled why Iran has not yet compromised in the face of a major American military build-up nearby.

item.title: Crews recover bodies of 9 backcountry skiers days after California avalanche
